## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed
- what evidence supports it

## Validation

- [ ] `python .\scripts\validate_repo.py`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets`
- [ ] benchmark or probe rerun attached when performance-sensitive code changed

## Evidence

- raw artifact path:
- host and toolchain context:
- interpretation of the observed effect:

- remaining uncertainty:
- unsupported environments:
- follow-up work:
